refundPolicy.title: MotoGT Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: At MotoGT, we’re committed to providing a seamless shopping experience for aftermarket automotive parts and accessories. If you’re not completely satisfied with your purchase, we’re here to help.

eligibility.title: Eligibility for Refunds
eligibility.description: You may request a refund for eligible items within 14 days of delivery, provided that:
items: The part has a defect or the fitment is incorrect due to MotoGT error
The item is unused, uninstalled, and in its original packaging
All original tags, labels, and documentation are intact
The item is not marked as final sale, clearance, or non-returnable (e.g. custom-made or special-order products)

process.title: Refund Process
steps: Submit a Return Request: Go to your MotoGT account > Orders > Report a problem.
Receive Return Instructions: Our team will contact you with the return instructions.
Ship the Item: You must ship the item using the provided return label (if eligible), or at your own cost.
Inspection & Refund: Once we receive and inspect the item, refunds are typically processed within 5–7 business days.
process.note: Refunds are issued to your original payment method. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to MotoGT error or a defective product.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable Items
items: Items returned more than 14 days after delivery

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.description: We currently do not support direct exchanges. To replace an item, please request a return and place a new order.

damaged.title: Damaged or Defective Items
damaged.description: If your item arrived damaged or defective, contact us within 7 days of delivery with photos and your order number. We'll prioritize a replacement or refund at no extra cost.

cancellations.title: Cancellations
cancellations.description: Orders can be canceled before they ship. To cancel, visit your order details or contact MotoGT Support. Once shipped, orders must follow the standard return process.

refundPolicy.closing: Thank you for choosing MotoGT. We appreciate your trust and are here to support your journey, mile after mile.

items.question: What can I find on MotoGT?
items.answer: MotoGT is your one stop shop for aftermarket car parts and accessories. From performance upgrades and lighting kits to interior add ons, wheels, tires, and vehicle protection. we've got thousands of products for a wide range of makes and models. Whether you're customizing, maintaining, or upgrading, you'll find the right part with the right fit.

items.question: How do I know if a part fits my vehicle?
items.answer: Simply use our vehicle selector (year, make, model) before you shop. You can also save cars to your Garage, we'll only show you parts that fit.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: You can pay using credit or debit card, CliQ, or cash on delivery. Depending on what's available in your area. All payments are securely processed and encrypted for your protection.

items.question: What's the shipping time & cost?
items.answer: Shipping within Jordan is currently free. We also offer international shipping, cost and estimated delivery time are shown at checkout.

items.question: Do you ship internationally?
items.answer: Yes, we currently ship to UAE, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, and Qatar, with more regions coming soon. International shipping rates and delivery times are shown at checkout.

items.question: Do you offer installation for parts?
items.answer: Yes, we do offer installation for parts. Contact our support team for details on availability, pricing, and scheduling for your order.
